name: native-gift-with-purchase
author: iminiscript (https://github.com/iminiscript)
description: Native (no-app) gift-with-purchase / free-gift builder for Shopify Online Store 2.0 (theme-blocks) themes such as Horizon — REQUIRES an OS 2.0 sections + theme-blocks architecture; NOT for vintage/legacy themes. Automatically adds a configured gift product line to the cart when a spend threshold is met (up to 5 tiers), shows a tiered progress bar ('spend $X more for a free Y') in the cart drawer/page plus an optional PDP message, keeps the gift quantity at 1, and removes it when the cart drops below the threshold. The gift line is marked with the `_isGWP` line-item property (plus `_gwp_tier`); add/remove happen via /cart/add.js and /cart/change.js guarded by a lock + state-memoization so the reconcile never infinite-loops. The gift is made FREE by the MERCHANT — either a $0 product/variant or a Shopify automatic 'free gift' discount — NOT by theme price manipulation; the theme adds the line and computes the threshold on the NON-gift subtotal. Everything (thresholds, labels, gift product, trigger tier, messages) is theme-customizer configurable. Use when a task involves a gift with purchase, free gift, GWP, spend-goal / cart progress bar, 'spend $X for a free gift', threshold reward, or free-shipping-style progress meter tied to a gift. NATIVE THEME BUILD ONLY — NOT a third-party gift/upsell/rewards app (Rebuy, etc.), NOT authoring the automatic discount itself, NOT a loyalty program, NOT the build-your-own-bundle builder (use native-bundle-builder). Never edits volatile template JSON — ships stable Liquid/JS/CSS.
